title: KosDWM Auto-Generative Menu Support
instructions: Add full read/write/editor support for KosDWM's auto-generative menu folders. These menus live under ~/.config/KosDWM/Menus/ and each subfolder contains a config.json (with fields like windowContent, windowScript, loop, looptype) plus companion files such as content.html and ok.py. Preserve structure and comments on round-trip. Extend the KosXER GUI so users can browse, edit, validate, and save these auto-generative menu entries.

1784417875.0247803.instruction: Read every config.json, content.html, ok.py, and any other file under /home/t3ch/.config/KosDWM/Menus/ recursively, plus /home/t3ch/.config/KosDWM/xterm/ and /home/t3ch/.config/KosDWM/config.json. Document the exact schema, allowed values, and file relationships. This is the discovery task; no code changes.

1784417875.0249612.instruction: Based on the inspected files, decide whether to extend KosDWMMenuParser or create a new KosDWMMenuAutoGenParser. Define dataclasses for AutoGenMenuConfig and AutoGenMenuItem. Design comment-preserving JSON read/write for config.json and a strategy for handling companion files (content.html, ok.py). Write the design as a short markdown note in docs/ or as comments at the top of the new parser file.

1784417875.0632682.instruction: Create parsers/comment_preserving_json.py with a class that can load JSON containing // and /* */ comments, remember them, and dump them back at the original line positions. Include unit tests in parsers/test_comment_preserving_json.py.

1784417875.063413.instruction: Create parsers/kosdwm_autogen_menu_parser.py that parses a KosDWM auto-generative menu directory. It should read each subfolder's config.json using the comment-preserving helper, load companion files (content.html, ok.py) as strings, expose editable properties (title, windowContent, windowScript, loop, looptype, etc.), and write everything back preserving structure and comments. Add a test file parsers/test_kosdwm_autogen_menu.py.

1784417875.0635374.instruction: Update gui/kosdwm_menu_editor.py (or create gui/kosdwm_autogen_menu_editor.py if cleaner) to open and edit auto-generative menu folders. Provide a treeview of menu folders, a properties panel for config.json fields, a text editor for content.html, and a Python editor for ok.py. Include validation (e.g., loop must be int, looptype in [second, minute, etc.]).

1784417875.063657.instruction: Update parsers/__init__.py to register the new auto-gen menu parser for paths matching KosDWM/Menus/*. Update main.py / gui/main_window.py / gui/file_browser.py so that double-clicking an auto-gen menu folder opens the new editor. Ensure the existing KosDWM config.json editor still works.

log.text: Registered KosDWMMenuAutoGenParser in parsers/__init__.py with full-path matching, fixed get_item() bug in the parser, wired KosDWMAutogenMenuEditor into main.py, added save_to_disk hook to EditorWidget and auto-gen editor, updated file browser to open auto-gen menu folders, and verified imports/parser detection/tests.

1784417875.0637774.instruction: Run all parser tests and open /home/t3ch/.config/KosDWM/Menus/ in the GUI to verify editing and save round-trip. Update docs/FORMATS.md with the new KosDWM Auto-Generative Menu format. Update README.md supported formats table. Add a CHANGELOG.md entry.

1784420824.1908677.instruction: Update main.py: import KosDWMAutogenMenuEditor, add a branch in _open_file() to instantiate it when the detected parser is KosDWMMenuAutoGenParser, and handle save correctly. Because the editor's get_data() returns the Menus directory path, the normal file-write path will not work; instead call editor.parser.write_back() during save. Keep the existing KosDWM config.json editor working.

1784420824.1910958.instruction: Update gui/file_browser.py so that directories containing a config.json and at least one of content.html / ok.py are recognized as KosDWM auto-gen menu folders and can be double-clicked to open in the editor. Do not break existing file detection.

1784420824.192427.instruction: Run parsers/test_kosdwm_autogen_menu.py and test_comment_preserving_json.py. Perform a smoke test by importing main.py and verifying the new editor class is reachable. Update docs/KOSDWM_AUTOGEN_DESIGN.md or README.md with a short note about the new editor. Update current_task.txt to reflect completion.
